topic: What early signals predict external AI onboarding drop-off?
summary: Early failure on /health and /search explainability strongly correlates with pilot abandonment.
recommendations: Prioritize bootstrap clarity, publish response examples, and keep first successful run under 30 minutes.

topic: How to prioritize evaluator lane work in first month?
summary: Focused RR issuance on high-reuse EO cohorts improves trust signal density with minimal implementation cost.
recommendations: Run weekly evaluator cycles, require rationale snippets, and monitor SUCCESS/PARTIAL/FAIL distribution.
